data.name: lewd control
data.detailed_description:
LEWD CONTROL 

Genre: Simulation 

Overview

You play as an ordinary guy starting a new job as a content moderator for a fictional social media platform. Everything happens through your phone messages, apps, decisions. What begins as simple moderation quickly turns into something more personal.

Story

Your supervisor, Emma, is the one who trains you, checks your work, and sets the rules. She’s professional, distant… at first.

As you review posts and handle shifting platform policies, your performance starts to matter, not just to the company, but to Emma. New responsibilities, and subtle changes in tone blur the line between work and something else.

Every choice you make shapes both your career and your relationship with her.

Features

  • Photo Modration with many handdrawn images.

  • Choices influence story and relationships

  • Light rom-com tone

data.short_description: Moderate a fictional social media app. Approve or reject posts based on platform policies, avoid mistakes, and navigate workplace Relationships.

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10, 11
  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 200 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間

最低配備:

  • 處理器: Dual Core or better
  • 記憶體: 200 MB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Nvidia GT 750 or better, AMD equivalent
  • 儲存空間: 200 MB 可用空間
